errors.unsupported_passkeys: This browser does not support passkeys.

login.title: Login
login.intro: Accounts stay private until you sign in with a passkey from your browser or password manager.
login.passkey_only_body: Sign-in is account-discovery free, so this page does not ask who you are before your passkey does.
login.localhost_hint_prefix: For local passkeys, open this page on
login.sign_in_body: Choose a passkey and your browser or password manager will identify the account for you.
login.create_account_body: We still need an email so the new account has an identifier you can share in invites and admin tools.
login.created_redirect: Passkey created. Redirecting to your dashboard...
login.accepted_redirect: Passkey accepted. Redirecting to your dashboard...

passkey_add.title: Add passkey
passkey_add.one_time_link: This one-time link was created for {email}.
passkey_add.register_another_body: Finishing this flow adds a new passkey to {display_name}'s account. Existing passkeys stay available.
passkey_add.create_another_body: Use the browser or password manager that should get access to this account.
passkey_add.created_redirect: Additional passkey created. Redirecting to your dashboard...

dashboard.title: Households and Lists
dashboard.intro: Start by creating one household for the people who shop together. Then create one or more lists inside that household, like Weekly Groceries, Costco Run, or Party Supplies.
dashboard.organized_step_user: You sign in and become a user.
dashboard.organized_step_household: A household groups the people sharing lists.
dashboard.organized_step_list: A list lives inside one household.
dashboard.organized_step_items: Items and categories live inside a list.
dashboard.organized_note: If this page is empty, it usually means you have not created your first household yet.
dashboard.no_households_body: Create your first household above. Once it exists, you can add lists to it immediately.
dashboard.add_household_body: Create a shared home for people and lists.
dashboard.add_list_body: Pick a household, then create a new shopping list inside it.
dashboard.add_item_to_empty: Create a household and list first
dashboard.household_examples: Examples: Home, Flatshare, Family, Office Kitchen.
dashboard.add_list_helper: Choose a household first, then add a list everyone can open and update.
dashboard.no_lists_yet: No lists yet. Use the form above to create the first one.
dashboard.invite_link_created: Invite link created. It stays valid for 24 hours.
dashboard.invite_link_create_failed: Could not create the invite link.
dashboard.invite_link_copy_failed: Could not copy the invite link.
dashboard.choose_list_before_adding: Create or choose a list before adding an item.
dashboard.household_created: Household created. You can add a list now.
dashboard.choose_household_before_list: Create or choose a household before creating a list.

settings.title: Account and passkey
settings.intro: Manage the passkeys tied to your account. Add, rename, or remove them here without mixing account security into the start page.
settings.language_helper: Use your browser default language, or pick a language for this browser.
settings.choose_language_help: This changes the language preference saved in this browser. Choose browser default to follow your system settings again.
settings.helper: You can register as many passkeys as you want. To delete one, you'll first need to prove one of your other passkeys still works.
settings.no_passkeys_body: Refresh the page or add a passkey to load this list.
settings.delete_help_generic: You must authenticate with another passkey to confirm you still have a working Passkey after deleting one.
settings.delete_help: You must authenticate with another passkey to confirm you still have a working Passkey after deleting one.
settings.delete_disabled: Add another passkey before deleting this one.
settings.delete_choose_first: Choose a passkey to delete first.
settings.deleted_success: Passkey deleted after confirming another one worked.
settings.rename_choose_first: Choose a passkey to rename first.
settings.renamed_success: Passkey renamed after confirming it still works.
settings.added_success: Another passkey is ready to use.

invite.title: Join a shared grocery space
invite.loading: Checking your invite link and household access.
invite.already_member: You already belong to this household. You can still use this invite to jump back into it.
invite.unavailable: This invite link is no longer available.

list_detail.empty_body: Tap the plus button to add the first thing you need.
list_detail.category_order_body: Put categories in your store order here. Categories you have not moved yet will stay alphabetical.
list_detail.no_category_hint: Keep this item above the category sections.
list_detail.create_categories_admin: Create categories in admin to customize the order for this list.
list_detail.item_added_back: Item added back to the list.
